short_summary: Iran deal may ease energy costs
rationale: A near US-Iran deal following Khamenei's death is the most relevant development for Portugal, as it could lower energy prices affecting cost of living; all other headlines are distant or irrelevant.

top_events.title: Iran deal near as Khamenei dies, Lebanon strikes continue
top_events.summary: Khamenei's death and a reportedly imminent US-Iran deal could ease global energy prices, providing indirect relief to Portuguese consumers and businesses. A qualitative new development.

top_events.title: Switzerland votes on population cap at 10 million
top_events.summary: Switzerland's referendum on capping population could set a precedent for EU migration debates, with minor indirect relevance to Portugal's own migration and EU policy environment.

top_events.title: Anthropic AI suspended for foreign nationals
top_events.summary: US restricts Anthropic AI tools for non-US nationals; minor indirect effect on Portuguese tech and digital economy access.
